heading: Disable LDAP Configuration
body:
To disable your current LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) settings using the Atlas UI:

Atlas disables your LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) authentication settings and your
LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) authorization settings.

To disable LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) authorization only, toggle the button next to LDAP Authorization to OFF. Atlas disables your LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) authorization settings.
